title: cremanthodium latilobum
intro: Cremanthodium latilobum, also known as the Mountain Snappy-tiger, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cremanthodium latilobum are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used in various forms to harness its medicinal properties.
